LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Advanced_Power_Armor: An advanced helmet designed for 英克雷 s老旧iers, offering exceptional protection against ballistic, blunt, and heat damage. Equipped with integrated systems for toxic environment resistance.
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Helmet
先进动力装甲头盔的 Mk II 变体，具有增强的耐用性和针对危险条件的环境耐受性。
英克雷 Advanced Power Armor Mk II Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_Hellfire_Power_Armor: 适用于地狱火动力装甲的重型头盔，提供无与伦比的保护和抵抗极端环境条件的能力。
英克雷 Hellfire Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Power_Armor_Helm: The standard helmet for the X02 Power Armor, providing balanced protection and advanced features for 英克雷 operatives in the field.
英克雷 X02 Power Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Enclave_X02_Tesla_Power_Armo: X02 Tesla Power Armor 的专用头盔，旨在防御基于能量的攻击，同时保持对环境危害的高抵抗力。
英克雷 X02 Tesla Power Armor Helmet
